extraction.one_line_summary: VACHEK Matthias (19yo) won from 6-man breakaway with GAZPROM deploying 3-rider numerical advantage, peloton mistimed chase leaving 1:22 gap at 11km to go
tactical_patterns: GAZPROM placed 3 riders in 6-man break including points jersey STRAKHOV, creating numerical dominance for stage win.
Peloton ceased chasing at 35km (gap 1:25), mistakenly assumed resumption time, never recovered when break maintained margin.
Breakaway with dedicated sprint train (3 GAZPROM) beat sprinter-led peloton chase despite 180km flat profile favoring bunch.

rider_signals.VACHEK Matthias: positive: 19yo beat experienced breakaway specialists after GAZPROM leadout, suggesting exceptional timing/sprint from unknown rider
rider_signals.STRAKHOV Dimitri: positive: sacrificed stage win to lead out teammate while securing black jersey, rare selflessness in breakaway sprint
rider_signals.PHILIPSEN Jasper: neutral: led peloton home but team miscalculated chase effort on controllable flat stage
